content_html:
31st March 2026

  • Ability to
    • configure different API keys for models based on their purpose- for example, set it up so enrichments always use
    gpt-5.4-mini
    with an API key dedicated to that purpose.#4

I released llm-echo 0.3 to provide an API key testing utility I needed for the tests for this new feature.
